name: Barrel Co., Ltd
summary: Barrel Co., Ltd provides clothing products in South Korea. It provides women, men, and kid clothing products; lifestyle wear; fit tops and bottoms; yoga accessories; neoprene products; water sports tops and bottoms; kids products; bags; shoes; hats; sunglasses; and other products. The company also offers products through online and offline stores. Barrel Co., Ltd is based in Seoul, South Korea.
